description: CompositionRed cap engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has velcro closure at the back for a customised fit, eyelets, Arsenal branding on the crown and 'Arsenal' text at the velcro closureWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) FitComfortWash careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryAll Gooners will love this nike cap with the Arsenal football club's logo on its crown. The fabric ensures zero distractions and helps keep out the sun. Wear this to flaunt your support for your favourite team!
